summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of AI research execution system iteration 2. All major fixes verified working: default light theme, planning flow plan generation and caching, resizable sidebars, React Flow graphs. Significant improvement from iteration 1 - the planning flow timeout issue has been resolved.
passed_tests: Default theme is light (white background) on page load
Theme toggle switches between light and dark themes correctly
Dashboard loads with Welcome message and Create New Project CTA
Dashboard shows project cards with status and progress indicators
Dashboard displays stats summary (3 Projects, 0 Papers Found, 14 Documents, 14 Tasks Done)
Navigator sidebar shows all sections (Projects, Tasks, Documents, Literature)
Clicking project in Navigator opens workspace with 3-panel layout
Workspace shows resizable Navigator and Inspector sidebars with drag handles
Sidebar resize functionality works (drag simulation successful)
Task Graph tab displays React Flow visualization with task nodes
Task Graph shows React Flow controls and minimap
Agent Graph tab shows n8n-style orchestration view with agent nodes
Agent Graph displays Router Agent, Literature Search Agent, PDF Agent, Reference Agent, Summary Agent, Synthesis Agent, Evaluator Agent, and Drafting Agent
Inspector panel shows project metadata and information
Planning flow opens from Create New Project button
Planning flow has 5 steps with progress indicator (research_goal, output_type, audience, scope, review)
Planning flow step 1: Research goal textarea accepts input
Planning flow steps 2-4: Output type, audience, and scope selection work
Planning flow step 5: Plan generation completes successfully (MAJOR FIX)
Generated plan shows comprehensive details: title, summary, scope, execution phases, search terms
Plan generation no longer times out (resolved from iteration 1)
Review step displays detailed plan with phases and metadata
Create Project button is present and functional
